definition: Of, pertaining to, or resembling the human voice or speech.
definitions: Of, pertaining to, or resembling the human voice or speech.
Used in the production of speech sounds.

definition: A divine calling to establish one's lifestyle.
definitions: A divine calling to establish one's lifestyle.
An occupation for which a person is suited, trained or qualified.

definition: Of or pertaining to a vocation.
definitions: Of or pertaining to a vocation.
That provides a special skill rather than academic knowledge.

definition: Making or characterized by a noisy outcry; clamorous.
definitions: Making or characterized by a noisy outcry; clamorous.

definition: A town in Taita-Taveta County, southern Kenya.
definitions: A town in Taita-Taveta County, southern Kenya.

definition: Sound uttered by the mouth, especially by human beings in speech or song; sound thus uttered considered as possessing some special quality or character.
definitions: Sound uttered by the mouth, especially by human beings in speech or song; sound thus uttered considered as possessing some special quality or character.
Sound made through vibration of the vocal cords; sonant, or intonated, utterance; tone; — distinguished from mere breath sound as heard in whispering and voiceless consonants.

definition: Containing nothing; empty; not occupied or filled.
definitions: Containing nothing; empty; not occupied or filled.
Having no incumbent; unoccupied; said of offices etc.

definition: Lo, there it is; ta-da; presto; behold!
definitions: Lo, there it is; ta-da; presto; behold!

definition: A carriage; a vehicle, now chiefly in French contexts.
definitions: A carriage; a vehicle, now chiefly in French contexts.

definition: Evaporating or vaporizing readily under normal conditions.
definitions: Evaporating or vaporizing readily under normal conditions.

definition: Of or pertaining to a volcano or volcanoes.
definitions: Of or pertaining to a volcano or volcanoes.
Produced by a volcano, or, more generally, by igneous agencies.

definition: A vent or fissure on the surface of a planet (usually in a mountainous form) with a magma chamber attached to the mantle of a planet or moon, periodically erupting forth lava and volcanic gases onto the surface.
definitions: A vent or fissure on the surface of a planet (usually in a mountainous form) with a magma chamber attached to the mantle of a planet or moon, periodically erupting forth lava and volcanic gases onto the surface.
A kind of firework producing an upward plume of sparks.

definition: A town and municipality in Tumbaya department, Jujuy province, Argentina.
definitions: A town and municipality in Tumbaya department, Jujuy province, Argentina.
A town and corregimiento in Tierras Altas district, Chiriquí province, Panama.
The mental power or ability of choosing; the will.

definition: The simultaneous firing of a number of missiles or bullets; the projectiles so fired.
definitions: The simultaneous firing of a number of missiles or bullets; the projectiles so fired.
A burst or emission of many things at once.

definition: A game played on a rectangular court between two teams of two to six players which involves striking a ball back and forth over a net.
definitions: A game played on a rectangular court between two teams of two to six players which involves striking a ball back and forth over a net.
The inflated ball used in such a game.

definition: The difference in electrostatic potential between two points in space, especially between live and neutral conductors or the earth.
definitions: The difference in electrostatic potential between two points in space, especially between live and neutral conductors or the earth.

definition: Fluent or having a ready flow of speech.
definitions: Fluent or having a ready flow of speech.
Of thoughts, feelings, or something that is expressed: expressed readily or at length and in a fluent manner.

definition: A three-dimensional measure of space that comprises a length, a width and a height. It is measured in units of cubic centimeters in metric, cubic inches or cubic feet in English measurement.
definitions: A three-dimensional measure of space that comprises a length, a width and a height. It is measured in units of cubic centimeters in metric, cubic inches or cubic feet in English measurement.
Strength of sound: how loud it is.

definition: Done, given, or acting of one's own free will.
definitions: Done, given, or acting of one's own free will.
Done by design or intention; intentional.

definition: One who enters into, or offers themselves for, any service of their own free will, especially when done without pay.
definitions: One who enters into, or offers themselves for, any service of their own free will, especially when done without pay.
One who enters into military service voluntarily (but who, when in service, is subject to discipline and regulations like other soldiers), as opposed to a conscript.

definition: Characterized or marked by full, generous, pleasurable sensation.
definitions: Characterized or marked by full, generous, pleasurable sensation.

definition: To regurgitate or eject the contents of the stomach through the mouth; puke.
definitions: To regurgitate or eject the contents of the stomach through the mouth; puke.
To regurgitate and discharge (something swallowed); to spew.

definition: A prior version or manifestation of a text.
definitions: A prior version or manifestation of a text.

definition: Initialism of verb–object–subject: a language is VOS if a typical sentence starts with the verb, followed by the object, followed by the subject.
definitions: Initialism of verb–object–subject: a language is VOS if a typical sentence starts with the verb, followed by the object, followed by the subject.

definition: A formalized choice on legally relevant measures such as employment or appointment to office or a proceeding about a legal dispute.
definitions: A formalized choice on legally relevant measures such as employment or appointment to office or a proceeding about a legal dispute.
An act or instance of participating in such a choice, e.g., by submitting a ballot.

definition: A commune of Indre-et-Loire department, France.
definitions: A commune of Indre-et-Loire department, France.

definition: To call on (someone) to be a witness to something.
definitions: To call on (someone) to be a witness to something.

definition: A piece of paper or other token that entitles the holder to a discount, or that can be exchanged for goods and services.
definitions: A piece of paper or other token that entitles the holder to a discount, or that can be exchanged for goods and services.

definition: A solemn promise to perform some act, or behave in a specified manner, especially a promise to live and act in accordance with the rules of a religious order.
definitions: A solemn promise to perform some act, or behave in a specified manner, especially a promise to live and act in accordance with the rules of a religious order.

definition: A sound produced by the vocal cords with relatively little restriction of the oral cavity, forming the prominent sound of a syllable.
definitions: A sound produced by the vocal cords with relatively little restriction of the oral cavity, forming the prominent sound of a syllable.
A letter or diacritic representing the sound of a vowel; in English, the vowels are a, e, i, o, u, y (sometimes), and w (rarely).

definition: A long journey, especially by ship.
definitions: A long journey, especially by ship.
A written account of a journey or travel.
Having to do with ordinary, common people.
An offensive or obscene act or expression.

definition: More or most likely to be exposed to the chance of being attacked or harmed, either physically or emotionally.
definitions: More or most likely to be exposed to the chance of being attacked or harmed, either physically or emotionally.
Open to disclosing one's inner thoughts and feelings, acting in spite of one's instinct to self-preservation.

definition: Any of several carrion-eating birds of the families Accipitridae and Cathartidae.
definitions: Any of several carrion-eating birds of the families Accipitridae and Cathartidae.
A person who profits from the suffering of others.
